steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase "counterintuitive effect" signals a contrast. Normally, higher prices reduce demand, but here buyers started rushing to purchase figures because they believed prices would rise further—this means the missing word must express 'causing demand.'

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: The correct word must mean 'to create or generate demand.' C does this directly. The others either focus on financial extraction (monetizing, exploiting) or describe unrelated actions (appraising). That matches choice C — C is correct.
